hero.headline: ULTRASOUND ART
hero.body:
A tiny black-and-white ultrasound photo is a thing of the past. Let the very first image of your child live forever! I artistically enhance your ultrasound image and bring it to life with colour.
Printed on canvas, you'll have not just a beautiful memory, but a modern, striking piece of décor for your home.
Optionally personalised with your child's name and number of weeks in the womb.

step1.title: Upload Your Image
step1.description: Share your clear ultrasound image with me

step2.title: Artistic Enhancement
step2.description: I create a beautiful digital portrait for you

step3.title: Canvas or Digital
step3.description: Receive your canvas print or digital file

pricing.title: Formats & Pricing
pricing.addon2: Number of weeks in the womb

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: Have questions or special requests? Send me a message and I'll get back to you as soon as possible!

ultrasound.title: For Ultrasound Portrait
ultrasound.item1: Choose a clear ultrasound image — profile views work best
ultrasound.item2: You will be notified immediately if the image is usable
ultrasound.item3: If not, you can submit a new image

individual.title: For Individual Portrait
individual.item1: Choose a clear photo of the person (300dpi preferred)
individual.item2: You will be notified if the photo meets requirements

couple.title: For Couple Portrait
couple.item1: Choose one profile photo per person — doesn't need to be a joint photo
couple.item3: You will be notified, and can submit new photos if needed

payment.title: Payment
payment.description: After confirmation email, payment via PayPal, bank transfer, or credit card
